generated_oml:
instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed component controlled via MOSFETs for 4A current"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan component with 12V/24V operation"
]

instance PCBActuators : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi GPIO-controlled actuators through PCB circuitry"
]

instance HeatbedTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring heatbed temperature (accuracy ±0.5°C from -10°C to +85°C)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData HeatbedTemperatureData
]

instance ChamberAirTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring internal chamber air temperature (accuracy ±0.5°C from -10°C to +85°C)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ChamberAirTemperatureData
]

instance ExternalAmbientTemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer measuring external ambient temperature (accuracy ±0.5°C from -10°C to +85°C)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData ExternalAmbientTemperatureData
]

instance HeatbedTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HeatbedTemperatureSensor
]

instance ChamberAirTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ChamberAirTemperatureSensor
]

instance ExternalAmbientTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ExternalAmbientTemperatureSensor
]

instance HeatbedTemperatureDataValue : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data from Heatbed DS18S20 sensor transmitted via RabbitMQ"
    DTDFVocab:fromData HeatbedTemperatureData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonScipy, RaspberryPi4Controller
]

instance ChamberAirTemperatureDataValue : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data from Chamber Air DS18S20 sensor transmitted via RabbitMQ"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ChamberAirTemperatureData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonScipy, RaspberryPi4Controller
]

instance ExternalAmbientTemperatureDataValue : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time temperature data from External Ambient DS18S20 sensor transmitted via RabbitMQ"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ExternalAmbientTemperatureData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PythonScipy, RaspberryPi4Controller
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model with parameters C_air and G_box"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RaspberryPi4Controller
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic thermal model with parameters C_heater, C_air, G_heater, G_box"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RaspberryPi4Controller
]

instance RabbitMQBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for communication between physical and virtual components"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, ParameterCalibrationService, SystemSafetyMonitoringService, BangBangControlOptimizationService
]

instance PythonScipy : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python Scipy library for non-linear least squares optimization"
    DTDFVocab:enables ParameterCalibrationService
]

instance RaspberryPi4Controller : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller for system management and data processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, SystemSafetyMonitoringService, BangBangControlOptimizationService
]

instance OneWireBusProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "1-Wire bus protocol for connecting DS18S20 temperature sensors"
    DTDFVocab:enables TemperaturePredictionService, ParameterCalibrationService
]

instance MOSFETs : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "MOSFETs for PCB circuit control of heatbed and fan"
]

instance Optocouplers : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Optocouplers for PCB circuit isolation"
]

instance PowerSupply : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Power supply for the thermal incubator system"
]

instance StyrofoamContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container (0.03 m³ air volume)"
]

instance TemperaturePredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation models (Model A and B) for temperature prediction"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictedTemperatureData
]

instance ParameterCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Non-linear least squares calibration of parameters using Python Scipy"
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibratedModelParameters
]

instance SystemSafetyMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of system safety by comparing predicted vs actual temperatures"
    DTDFVocab:provides AnomalyDetection
]

instance BangBangControlOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimization of bang-bang control parameters (H and C) for temperature regulation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlParameterOptimization
]

instance PredictedTemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature values from thermal models"
]

instance CalibratedModelParameters : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibrated parameters for thermal models"
]

instance AnomalyDetection : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detected anomalies by comparing predicted vs actual temperatures"
]

instance ControlParameterOptimization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimized bang-bang control parameters H and C for temperature regulation"
]

instance ThermalIncubatorSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system with styrofoam insulated container (0.03 m³ air volume), heatbed, fan, temperature sensors, Raspberry Pi 4, PCB, and power supply"
    base:contains Heatbed, Fan, HeatbedTemperatureSensor, ChamberAirTemperatureSensor, ExternalAmbientTemperatureSensor, RaspberryPi4Controller, PCBActuators, MOSFETs, Optocouplers, PowerSupply, StyrofoamContainer
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands for heatbed and fan generated by DT and transmitted via RabbitMQ to low-level driver, which triggers MOSFET-based actuation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestrated via RabbitMQ where physical components (sensors, actuators) communicate with DT models and algorithms through message-based interaction; DT includes simulation models, calibration algorithms, and monitoring services."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin operates during the 'as operated' phase of the physical incubator's lifecycle, continuously monitoring and controlling the system post-deployment."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model B has higher fidelity due to accounting for heatbed thermal inertia; validation via experimental comparison of predicted vs measured temperatures; uniformity assumption tested with multiple sensors showing discrepancies up to 7°C (reduced to 6°C with higher fan voltage)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker protocol for data exchange between PT (sensors, actuators) and DT components; data transmitted via RabbitMQ queues."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "DT hosted on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B with RabbitMQ server running locally; low-level driver and controller implemented on the same device."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Low-level driver implements a safe protocol to prevent unsafe actuation; no details on cybersecurity measures or remote operation safety are provided in the document."
]
